title: Bug with 4-state module parameters
body:
Hello.

I'm getting a very strange bug while trying to run Yosys GLS. This is a minimum example:

```
Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
Verilator 5.025 devel rev v5.024-56-g5f85c8942
```
Test case:
```systemverilog
module a #(parameter P = 1'bx);
endmodule

module t;
    a a();
endmodule
```
```bash
verilator test.sv --lint-only --x-assign unique --trace-fst
```
Output:
```
%Error: Internal Error: test1.v:2:26: ../V3Localize.cpp:184: AstVarRef not under function
    2 | module a #(parameter P = 1'bx);
      |                          ^~~~~~
```
I have not had a chance to look into this yet.
